title: Besleria melancholica
taxonomy: Besleria melancholica is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It belongs to the genus Besleria, which is a group of flowering plants native to tropical regions. The family Gesneriaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as the "African violet" family. These plants are characterized by their showy flowers and often unique growth habits. Besleria melancholica is a specific species within this larger group, known for its distinctive characteristics.

preparations: Besleria melancholica is a plant species found in the tropical regions of Central and South America, and its uses in herbal preparations are primarily based on traditional knowledge. intro: Besleria melancholica, a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, is native to the tropical rainforests of Central and South America.
